step.title: Finalize and Handoff
step.goal: Write the locked Writing Plan to the ticket body, stamp last_updated, re-validate, present handoff to ticket-write.

substep.title: Write Plan to Worklog
substep.action:
Append {{plan_final}} to the worklog file. Heading: "## Writing Plan" (level 2). Placement: AFTER the Structure Outline section in the worklog.
Worklog journal now reads: - Orient Summary (orient) - Q↔R Readiness Summary (grill) - Design Summary (design) - Structure Outline (structure) - Writing Plan (this skill) - (later: Verify Session, written by ticket-verify)

substep.title: Stamp last_updated
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{worklog_path}}" --note "P-phase complete; Writing Plan locked. Estimated length: {{total_estimate}} lines, {{checkpoint_count}} review checkpoints."

substep.title: Present Final Handoff
